/usr/bin/clang++ -nostartfiles -nostdlib -static  -O2 -DNDEBUG -g -Xclang -gcodeview -D_DLL -D_MT -Xclang --dependent-lib=msvcrt  -L"/home/faye/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/crt/lib/x86_64" -L"/home/faye/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/lib/ucrt/x86_64" -L"/home/faye/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/lib/um/x86_64" -L"/home/faye/Documents/engine/build-win/winsdk_lib_symlinks" -Xlinker /subsystem:console -fuse-ld=lld-link @CMakeFiles/engine.dir/objects1.rsp -o engine.exe -Xlinker /MANIFEST:EMBED -Xlinker /implib:engine.lib -Xlinker /pdb:/home/faye/Documents/engine/build-win/engine.pdb -Xlinker /version:0.0  @CMakeFiles/engine.dir/linkLibs.rsp
